name: Collapsible
description: A container component that manages collapsible/expandable content with controlled and uncontrolled state support.
usage_guidelines: Compose with CollapsibleTrigger and CollapsibleContent components.
Use controlled (open prop) or uncontrolled (defaultOpen) state.

defaultOpen.description: Default open state for uncontrolled component.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

styling_info.visual_description: Container component that provides context for collapsible behavior. Visual styling depends on child components.

Do: Compose with trigger and content components

Accordion.title: Accordion

Basic.title: Basic
Basic.code:
import Collapsible from '@/components/ui/Collapsible' const Basic = () => { return (
Click to expand

This is the collapsible content. It can contain any elements you want to show or hide. The animation is smooth and the content height is automatically calculated.

) } export default Basic

Controlled.title: Controlled
Controlled.code:
import { useState } from 'react' import Collapsible from '@/components/ui/Collapsible' import Button from '@/components/ui/Button' const Controlled = () => { const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false) return (
Controlled Collapsible

This collapsible is controlled externally. You can use the button above or click the trigger to toggle it. The state is managed by the parent component.

) } export default Controlled

CustomTrigger.title: Custom Trigger
CustomTrigger.code:
import Collapsible from '@/components/ui/Collapsible' import Button from '@/components/ui/Button' import { HiChevronRight } from 'react-icons/hi' const CustomTrigger = () => { return (
{({ isOpen, toggle }) => ( )}

Using the render props pattern, you have full control over the trigger appearance and behavior. The function receives isOpen and toggle{' '} props.

) } export default CustomTrigger

Collapsible.Trigger.description: Trigger element that toggles the collapsible content.

asChild.description: Render as child element instead of wrapper.

Collapsible.Content.description: Content that is shown/hidden when toggled.
